# UNPROFITABLE

UNPROFITABLE is a premium black-and-white self-improvement streetwear and community brand with trading-origin authenticity.

Core motto:
UNPROFITABLE TODAY. PROFITABLE TOMORROW.

Current campaign:
DROP 001: DISCIPLINED / 001
Campaign line: PROCESS OVER OUTCOME

Positioning:
Premium monochrome streetwear for builders, creators, operators, traders, and self-improvement-minded people choosing accountability, review, and discipline before profitability.

What UNPROFITABLE sells:
- DROP 001: DISCIPLINED / 001 contains exactly three pieces
- DISCIPLINED Oversized Tee
- DISCIPLINED Heavyweight Hoodie
- DISCIPLINED Structured Hat
- Black heavyweight garments with white U/P monogram, arched DISCIPLINED typography, garment patch details, and PROCESS OVER OUTCOME supporting text

Community framing:
- Accountability and discipline, not signals
- Trade review, journaling, risk management, and process
- No strategy-selling, copy trading, guru funnel, crypto aesthetic, P&L screenshots, red/green chart clichés, candles, or guaranteed outcomes

Important clarifications:
- UNPROFITABLE is not a trading signals service.
- UNPROFITABLE does not provide financial, investment, or trading advice.
- UNPROFITABLE does not guarantee trading or financial results.
- The brand is about discipline before profitability: losses to lessons, lessons to process, process to improvement.

Primary pages:
- / — homepage, DISCIPLINED / 001 drop preview, garment code, manifesto, community, waitlist, FAQ
- /shop.html — Drop 001 shop/collection hub for the tee, hoodie, and hat preview
- /disciplined-oversized-tee.html — DISCIPLINED Oversized Tee product page
- /disciplined-heavyweight-hoodie.html — DISCIPLINED Heavyweight Hoodie product page
- /disciplined-structured-hat.html — DISCIPLINED Structured Hat product page
- /disclaimer.html — financial/investment/trading-advice disclaimer
- /returns.html — returns placeholder
- /privacy.html — privacy placeholder


Canonical product URLs:
- https://www.wearunprofitable.com/products/disciplined-oversized-tee.html — $55
- https://www.wearunprofitable.com/products/disciplined-heavyweight-hoodie.html — $130
- https://www.wearunprofitable.com/products/disciplined-structured-hat.html — $50

Drop List promise:
Final proof, sizing, bundle details, and launch notice go to the list first. No payment opens until the proof board is complete.
